Intro: wide establishing anime frame with the protagonist small but clearly identifiable
low-angle opening frame revealing the environment before the subject
slow lateral reveal from the recurring motif into the protagonist silhouette
distant silhouette shot framed by the song-specific light source
Bridge: intimate close-up profile shifting to a three-quarter emotional reveal
tight hand-and-face composition with the motif crossing the foreground
slow overhead drift into a vulnerable close frame
split-reflection close-up where the subject turns toward the camera
Outro: slow pullback from the signature prop to the full silhouette
wide resolving frame with the subject becoming small inside the final environment
quiet close-up on the motif before dissolving to the empty scene
rear silhouette shot facing the last remaining light

chorus_fast_shot: dynamic forward tracking shot, low angle, strong beat-synced foreground streaks
fast arc around the subject with impact flashes on the hook
low tracking shot cutting through foreground light bands
chorus_default_shot: forward tracking shot with widening background parallax and brighter rim light
gentle orbit around the subject as the hook opens the frame
medium-wide push through layered light with the motif leading
upward angle tracking shot that lifts with the chorus emotion
mirror_shot: medium close-up reflected in a dark surface with neon fracture light framing the face
split reflection shot with the face and motif separated by a bright edge
over-shoulder reflection frame where the environment doubles the subject

sad: close-up profile or low-angle tilt down, shallow depth isolating the face
wide low-angle frame with the figure small against empty shadow
tight face composition with soft rim light and closed-off posture
static medium frame holding on stillness as light slowly fades from the background
slow rack focus from background detail to the subject's face in subdued light
lonely: wide static frame — small figure against large negative space
long-lens isolation shot with the subject offset to one side
slow dolly backward leaving the figure centered in empty space
locked-off frame with a single figure against an empty environment, minimal movement
gentle tilt down from open sky to the figure standing in isolation
loneliness: slow lateral dolly with strong silhouette against empty background
wide static three-quarter frame with the motif just out of reach
overhead drift centering the figure in a void of negative space
medium still frame with the subject centered in an empty environment
slow zoom from a distant detail toward the isolated figure
angry: fast low-angle push-in with impact flash cuts
rapid whip-pan tracking shot with hard edge framing
tight low-angle tilt-up into the subject's silhouette
close-up tilt from hands to face with high-contrast sharp framing
static medium frame with abrupt cut to tight close-up at the peak beat
defiant: strong low angle rising slowly toward the sky
wide upward tilt framing the subject against an open horizon
slow rising arc from ground level to chest height
medium-wide side profile with the subject standing firm against open space
steady low-angle medium frame as the subject turns to face the camera
romantic: gentle orbit or soft push-in with warm shallow depth
slow dolly-in toward a hand or face detail with soft background bloom
three-quarter medium frame with warm secondary light framing the profile
soft slow arc revealing the scene from behind the subject's silhouette
medium close frame with warm light bridging the subject and the environment
longing: slow zoom into a small detail, then pull back to full isolation
static medium frame holding still as the subject reaches toward empty space
gentle rack focus from the motif in the foreground to the subject's face
wide frame with the subject small in foreground and the empty distance beyond
medium profile shot with the subject's gaze directed out of frame
anxious: slight handheld shake, tight crop frame
quick reframe with unstable horizon and compressed depth
jump-cut zoom series with each cut tighter than the last
tight over-shoulder frame with cluttered background pressing in
slightly tilted medium frame with the subject caught off-balance
peaceful: wide still frame or slow gentle overhead drift
slow lateral glide across a serene environment
locked-off wide frame with minimal subject movement
low-angle wide frame looking up through natural environmental elements
medium static frame with slow ambient movement in the surroundings
excited: dynamic lateral tracking with quick panning bursts
whip-pan transitions between subject and environment details
fast arc around the subject with rapid foreground parallax
rising crane shot that opens the environment from ground level upward
medium frame with quick foreground element passing across the lens
bittersweet: medium profile with slow dolly and split-tone depth
gentle push-in that stops just short of the face, holding the distance
slow zoom from the motif back to the subject's expression
slow arc from the motif object to the subject's face in one continuous move
medium frame where the subject is caught between shadow and open light
nostalgic: gentle push-in with shallow atmospheric depth
slow lateral reveal uncovering a remembered environment detail
soft zoom-out from a close detail to a wider environmental frame
medium profile looking sideways into a remembered space
slow dolly forward into an environment detail as the subject holds still
hopeful: forward tracking shot into open space, upward angle
wide lift shot with the subject stepping toward a brighter horizon
soft push-in as overhead light opens around the subject
medium close-up with the subject looking upward toward an open light source
gentle arc shot circling the subject as light expands across the frame

shot: wide shot with strong negative space surrounding the figure
long-lens isolation shot with the subject offset to one side
static distant frame where the environment outweighs the figure
tight close-up on hands or face with soft neon rim light
macro detail shot of the motif crossing the fingers
close side profile with shallow atmospheric depth
dynamic low tracking shot with motion blur on background elements
side tracking shot with light streaks sliding across the frame
forward-leaning medium shot with fast foreground parallax

default: medium shot with lyric-specific hand action and soft parallax background
medium-wide frame balancing the subject, motif, and environment
three-quarter shot with the motif in the foreground and soft depth layers
quiet side-profile frame shaped by the section emotion
